record.field: Polite / friendly call-centre vocabulary. Each match adds +12 to the tone score (cap +42).

thank you thanks thank appreciate grateful please kindly certainly definitely absolutely gladly happy to help my pleasure of course no problem you're welcome sure thing understood got it take care have a great day wonderful excellent fantastic perfect awesome helpful sorry apologize my apologies regret hope look forward would love will do right away immediately promise assure value important respect patience support assist welcome glad pleased delighted
Harsh / dismissive vocabulary. Each match subtracts 18 from the tone score (cap -54).

impossible ridiculous stupid dumb idiot useless waste of time terrible awful horrible disgusting pathetic lame garbage trash hopeless annoying irritating frustrating furious told you already said already listen to me shut up just do it figure it out deal with it your problem your fault your mistake not my problem not my job whatever forget it never mind nonsense useless complaint
Mild English profanity (exact word match to avoid false positives like "classic" matching "ass"). Treated as hard language for scoring.
damn hell shit fuck fucking bitch asshole bastard crap piss dick prick bullshit wtf stfu gtfo screw you bloody hell
